from pathlib import Path


def find_files(base_dir, filenames):
    results = []
    for name in filenames:
        path = Path(base_dir).resolve() / name
        if path.exists():
            results.append(path)
    return results


def process_logs(log_dir, dates):
    entries = []
    for date in dates:
        resolved = Path(log_dir).expanduser() / f"{date}.log"
        if resolved.exists():
            entries.append(resolved.read_text())
    return entries


def check_configs(base, environments):
    configs = {}
    for env in environments:
        cfg = Path(base).resolve() / f"{env}.yaml"
        configs[env] = cfg.exists()
    return configs
